global.description: The ad features a modern design with a focus on the SwiftStack brand and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save confidently with a quick signup process.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: SwiftStack logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the word 'SwiftStack' in bold, modern typography, positioned at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of geometric shapes, including a circle and a square, rendered in a muted color palette, centered in the ad.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: Additional abstract shapes that complement the central design, adding depth and interest to the visual composition.

elements.label: background element
elements.description: A subtle decorative element that enhances the background, providing texture without distracting from the main content.

elements.label: main message
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Save with confidence' with a smaller tagline 'Fast signup, instant card' below it, centrally positioned.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Fast signup; instant card

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Learn more' in white, set against a dark background, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: SwiftStack headline
elements.description: The word 'SwiftStack' displayed in a large, bold font at the top of the ad, conveying the brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold typography, SwiftStack logo, main message, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main message in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: SwiftStack, Save with confidence, Fast signup, instant card, €9.99, Learn more
